messages.content:

At each step, EITHER issue exactly one more natural-language sub-query to gather missing information, OR give the final answer if you already have enough.
Respond with EXACTLY ONE of the following and nothing else:
  <sub-query>a single self-contained, single-tool question</sub-query>
  <final_answer>your concise final answer</final_answer>

Original question: What 2024 Beyoncé album broke streaming records with its blend of country-pop and Americana?

History so far:
Step 1 sub-query: What 2024 Beyoncé album broke streaming records country-pop Americana
  Tool: google_search
  Result: [{"title": "Cowboy Carter - Wikipedia", "link": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cowboy_Carter", "snippet": "Cowboy Carter landed Beyonc\u00e9 her biggest streaming week ever and broke streaming records on several platforms. [187][188] On Spotify, the album became one of the most-streamed albums in a single day in 2024, the biggest debut of the year for a country album, and the biggest debut ever for any album by a Black woman, with over 76 million ...", "content": "Cowboy Carter - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia 2024 studio album by Beyonc\u00e9 Cowboy Carter Standard cover Studio album by Beyonc\u00e9 Released March 29, 2024 ( 2024-03-29 ) Recorded 2011 [ a ] [ 1 ] c. 2019\u20132024 [ 2 ] Studio APG Dezert Flower Electric Feel Kings Landing West Parkwood West Record Plant The Sound Factory The Village Westlake Recording (Los Angeles) The Cave East Iris The Library (Nashville) The Trailer ( East Hampton, New York ) Dolly P 's Studio Genre Country country pop outlaw country pop Americana western country-soul blues hip-hop R&B Length 78 : 21 Language English Italian Label Parkwood Columbia Producer 070 Shake BAH Jon Batiste Beyonc\u00e9 Cadenza Cam Mile

Your next action:

response:
<final_answer>
Cowboy Carter is the 2024 Beyoncé album that broke streaming records with its blend of country-pop and Americana. Released on March 29, 2024, it became Beyoncé's biggest streaming week ever, achieving over 76 million streams on Spotify in its debut, making it the biggest debut of the year for a country album and the biggest debut ever for any album by a Black woman.
</final_answer>
